codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix moves environment resolution to client construction via `OpenAIBuilder::build()` and `ClientConfig::with_env_defaults()`, so later request preparation and request-option resolution read only frozen client state. The new regression test demonstrates that post-construction env mutations no longer change auth, base URL, organization, or project routing, and I did not find a remaining per-request env read in the shared client path.

summary: Pass: the original blocking env-determinism issue is fixed. `OpenAI::new()` and builder-created clients now snapshot env-backed config at construction (`src/client.rs:20-22`, `src/client.rs:256`, `src/config.rs:61-71`), `resolve()` no longer re-reads process env on each request (`src/config.rs:75-103`), and the new regression test proves mutated env vars do not redirect requests or headers (`tests/core_config.rs:181-241`). No new blocking issues or shared-state gaps were identified.
